profile: Engineer focused on platform reliability across legacy and modern environments. I combine operational discipline with technical delivery to keep transaction-critical systems stable as architecture evolves.

highlights: Worked on high-reliability banking flows where mainframe logic and modern services must align without introducing failure risk.
Contributed to architecture and delivery decisions across transaction-heavy production systems with strict stability targets.
Improved maintainability and release confidence in regulated infrastructure handling critical financial processes.
Delivered backend and systems work across Linux environments, APIs and banking integration boundaries.
Provided hands-on support for runtime behavior, operational incidents and end-to-end troubleshooting.
Built execution discipline, ownership and resilience patterns now applied to engineering work.
Led teams and outcomes in environments where continuity, accountability and delivery quality were business-critical.

projects.name: Resume Presentation System
projects.description: A minimal profile presentation with role-targeted content variants and print support for hiring workflows.

projects.name: Core-to-Modern Integration
projects.description: Production-facing integration work connecting stable transactional systems to modern service layers while preserving reliability.
